items.summary: Fix the infinite 'Loading your profile...' state in App.tsx. The app is stuck showing a loading spinner and never resolves to either the login screen or the main UI. Investigate the profile-fetching logic in useQueries.ts (useGetProfile or equivalent hook) — add a timeout or error boundary so that if the profile query fails, errors out, or returns null/undefined after a reasonable timeout (e.g., 5 seconds), the app falls back gracefully to the unauthenticated login state instead of spinning forever. Ensure the loading guard in App.tsx does not block rendering when the actor or identity is not yet ready.

Reset or clear any corrupted stable state in the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) that may be causing the profile lookup to hang or fail on canister call. The user has explicitly consented to data loss. Drop and reinitialize all stable variables (expenses, userProfiles, or equivalent) to empty collections so the canister starts fresh and responds correctly to profile queries.
